courses.title: Sample Branching Course
courses.description: A demo course with branching paths.

courses.title: Computer Networks and Protocols for Social Work
courses.description: Master computer networks and protocols through the lens of social work. Learn how data flows between agencies, how to secure client information, and design communication systems that protect vulnerable populations.

courses.title: Introduction to Quantum Computing
courses.description: Learn quantum computing concepts through the lens of social work applications and real case studies.

courses.title: Computer Networks and Protocols: A Space Exploration Journey
courses.description: Learn how networks and protocols enable communication across the cosmos, from Earth to distant planets and spacecraft.

courses.title: Operating Systems Fundamentals: An EdTech Perspective
courses.description: Explore how operating systems power educational technology platforms through three key topics: processes and scheduling, memory management, and file systems. Learn real-world EdTech scenarios and how OS fundamentals ensure reliable, responsive, and secure learning platforms.

courses.title: Digital Electronics for Smart Buildings
courses.description: Learn digital electronics fundamentals through designing an intelligent building automation system. Choose your design path and navigate the consequences of your architectural decisions.

courses.title: Control Systems for Environmental Management
courses.description: Master control systems through real-world environmental science applications. Adaptive pathway based on your knowledge level.

courses.title: Computer Networks and Protocols for Game Design
courses.description: Learn how games communicate over networks, from protocol fundamentals to real-world multiplayer architecture.

courses.title: Cloud Computing Fundamentals
courses.description: Master cloud computing concepts through architectural design principles and real-world building analogies

courses.title: Docker and Containerization: A Space Exploration Journey
courses.description: Learn Docker and containerization concepts through the lens of space exploration missions. Adaptive branching routes you to advanced or foundational content based on diagnostic assessment.
